All 4 threads point to the same mismatch: SUBSUMED recommendation text said 'deletion candidate' / 'prune candidate' while the analysis doc concludes moderate-band action = rewrite boundary + confirmatory eval, not delete. The per-pair recommendation cells and the matrix.json recommendation field are the specific locations.
